Notice Of Motion For Order Preference In Special Setting Of Trial
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Lyubov Lebedeva's Motion for Preference pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 36(a).
Department 220. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Kevin R. Dougherty; CSR: Not Reported.

David W. Wessel, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lyubov Lebedeva who was not present at today's hearing.
No Appearance by defendant City & County of San Francisco ("CCSF"), but defendant CCSF did submit a written opposition to plaintiff's motion.

After reviewing the moving & opposition papers, and good cause appearing therefor, plaintiff's motion for preference pursuant to CCP 36(a) is GRANTED. Trial in this matter is set for Monday, May 14, 2012 @ 9:30 a.m. in Department 206. Notice of the date & time of trial is set forth on page two of the order granting the present motion.

Order granted plaintiff's motion for preference pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 36(a) was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion For Order Preference In Special Setting Of Trial
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Continued To Jan-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220
